name: defeat_condition
description_pt: Condição de derrota: PLAYER_DEAD (polling de grupo), TIME_UP ou CUSTOM. check() manual ou trigger() direto. Emite defeat_triggered.
description_en: Defeat condition: PLAYER_DEAD (group polling), TIME_UP, or CUSTOM. Manual check() or direct trigger(). Emits defeat_triggered.

signals.name: defeat_triggered
signals.description_pt: Emitido quando a condição é satisfeita.
